command.encrypt.title: Encrypt Current File
command.decrypt.title: Permanently Decrypt Current File
configuration.title: Secret Notes
configuration.fileExtensions.description: File extensions to manage (without leading dots), for example `["txt", "md"]`.
configuration.exclude.description: Directories to ignore, for example `["node_modules", "dist"]`. Matched files won't show encrypt/permanent decrypt actions.
configuration.passwordKeepMinute.descrip: Password cache time in minutes. After this time, the cached password in state should be cleared. Set to `0` to disable caching.
